t_ch: 既然你这么热情，我也一定会使出同为「冠军首席」的全力的！

t_ch: 让我看看……

t_ch: …你居然真的有领取资格，我总算是没在这白站这么久。

t_ch: 这枚<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>就是这次的福利了，如果你能拿到新的资格徽章就再来找我吧。
t_en: Take this <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chip</color> as your reward. Come and see me again if you receive another Mastery Mark.

t_ch: 让我看看……
t_en: Let me see...

t_ch: 来，这次的福利也是<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>，好好使用吧。

t_ch: 让我看看……
t_en: Let me see...

t_ch: 这个给你，希望这只<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>能帮你战胜更多对手。
t_en: This is for you, I hope this <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Spirit</color> can help you defeat even more rivals!

t_ch: 让我看看……
t_en: Let me see...

t_ch: …你拥有领取最后一份福利的资格，没想到今天能遇到能拿走所有福利的玩家！
t_en: ...You're qualified to claim the final reward, I didn't expect to meet a player that would take away all the rewards today!

t_ch: 这只<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>就是最后的奖励了，拿去吧。
t_en: This <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Spirit</color> is the final reward, take it.

t_ch: 诶，你是《以太战线》的玩家吧？
t_en: Oh, you're an Aetherium Wars player?

t_ch: 呃…是这样的，我是「星际决胜庆典」的运营，在这里发放玩家福利。
t_en: Uhh... Well you see, I'm the Interastral Tournament Festival operator, I distribute player benefits here.

t_ch: 玩家福利？

t_ch: 对，就是公司为了推广《以太战线》，多撺掇玩家来线下参加庆典，就让我在这儿杵着给你们发东西。
t_en: That's right, the IPC asked me to work this stall and hand out gifts to players to promote Aetherium Wars, and encourage players to come to the festival in person.

t_ch: 我是玩家，给我福利。
t_en: I'm a player, give me benefits.

t_ch: 别急，你还不知道这些游戏的套路吗？虽然说是福利，但肯定是需要条件才能领的。
t_en: Hold on, you still don't know how this works, do you? They are benefits, but there are conditions that have to be met to claim them.

t_ch: 等你完成了决胜乐园的考验，战胜冠军候补，就能拿着资格徽章在我这儿领福利了。
t_en: When you complete the Victory Zone trials and defeat a Championship Contender, you will receive Mastery Marks that you can use to claim benefits here.

t_ch: 都能领到什么福利？
t_en: What benefits are there?

t_ch: 都能领到什么福利…都能领到什么来着？让我看看……
t_en: What benefits are there... Hmm, what are they? Let me see...

t_ch: 福利应该很丰厚吧？
t_en: They must be pretty generous, right?

t_ch: 别抱太大期望啊，这公司对员工都这么抠门，对玩家更不用说了，让我看看……

t_ch: 不会都是些破烂吧？

t_ch: 不能吧？费这么大劲办一场庆典，应该不能太寒碜，让我看看啊……

t_ch: 你别说，居然还真不错——强力<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>还有限定的<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>！
t_en: No way, they're actually pretty good! There are powerful <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chips</color>, as well as limited-edition <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Spirits</color>!

t_ch: 倒也不奇怪，反正战胜冠军候补的也不会有几个人…总之，你要是能拿到资格徽章，就来找我领福利吧。
t_en: I guess that makes sense, there won't be many people that can defeat Championship Contenders, after all... Anyway, if you manage to get yourself some Mastery Marks, come to me for your benefits.

t_ch: 是你啊，想要来领福利吗？
t_en: Oh, it's you! Are you here to claim benefits?

t_ch: 是你啊，有什么事吗？
t_en: Oh it's you, how can I help?

t_ch: 让我看看……
t_en: Let me see...

t_ch: …你没有可以领取的福利啊，等拿到新的资格徽章再来找我吧。
t_en: ...You aren't qualified to claim any benefits. Come back again when you get a new Mastery Mark.

t_ch: 行，反正这工作也怪无聊的，聊呗。
t_en: Alright, this job is pretty dull, let's chat.

t_ch: 你喜欢这份工作吗？
t_en: Do you enjoy your job?

t_ch: …你看我这态度，像是喜欢的样子吗？明明制作组做个系统就能搞定的事情，却要我在这里站上好几天！
t_en: Do I seem like I am enjoying myself? This is clearly something the devs could make a system for, yet they have me standing here for days on end!

t_ch: 我每天跟一大堆人浪费口舌介绍福利，但到最后根本发不出去几份。哪有那么多人能打过冠军候补啊，这帮领导都不看玩家数据的吗？
t_en: I spend all day wasting my time explaining player benefits, and I never get to give any out. Do the higher-ups really think that many people will beat Championship Contenders? Does senior management not look at player stats?

t_ch: 唉，下次我绝对不来当福利发放员了……
t_en: Ah, I won't be doing this job again...

t_ch: 你喜欢《以太战线》吗？
t_en: Do you like Aetherium Wars?

t_ch: 《以太战线》…我以前是挺喜欢的，不然也不会主动跑到这儿工作了，但我现在已经完全不感兴趣了。

t_en: It used to be that playing Aetherium Wars after work was my one joy in life. But since I started working for them and exhausting myself here every day, just hearing the name makes my jaw clench.

t_ch: 没办法，当兴趣变成工作，就难免会变得无趣了。
t_en: But what can I do? A hobby always gets boring when it becomes a job.

t_ch: 聊聊维尔德吧。
t_en: Let's talk about Wilder.

t_ch: 维尔德？聊他干什么，扫兴！
t_en: Wilder? What's there to talk about, what a buzz kill!

t_ch: 自从他当上了「星际决胜庆典」的运营负责人，每天都安排超额的工作，专挑下班时间开会，半夜打电话聊方案，我们这些员工没有一天能睡个安稳觉。
t_en: Ever since he became head of operations at the "Interastral Tournament Festival," he's arranged overtime every day, set up after-work meetings and started calling in the middle of the night to discuss plans! We employees can't even get a good sleep!

t_ch: 他确实尽职尽责，也确实热爱自己的工作，但大多数人就是想混口饭吃，谁想陪他为梦想天天卖命啊！
t_en: He is dedicated to his work and clearly loves it, but most people are just working to get food on the table! Who wants to work themselves into the ground every day for his dreams!?

t_ch: 咳，你可别跟他打小报告，我要是被停职了，就没人给你送福利了。
t_en: Ahem, please don't report this back to him. If I get fired, there will be no one here to give you benefits.

t_ch: 先聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's all I wanted to talk about.

t_ch: 好，我继续我的苦差事，你加油吧。
t_en: Alright, let me get back to my hard labor. Good luck!

t_ch: 行了，快玩去吧，我还得接待其他玩家呢。
t_en: Alright, go play, I've got other players to serve.

t_ch: 你已经领完了所有福利，我这里没什么东西能给你了。
t_en: You've already claimed all possible benefits, I have nothing left to give you.

t_ch: 唉，如果所有玩家都像你这么厉害，我的工作或许还能有意义一点。
t_en: Ah, if all players were as amazing as you, maybe my work would have some meaning.

t_ch: 我想领取福利。
t_en: I want to claim benefits.

t_ch: 我想和你聊聊…
t_en: I want to chat with you...

t_ch: 没事了，谢谢你。
t_en: Nothing, thanks.

t_ch: 就让你们尝尝我们的厉害！
t_en: Here's a taste of our full strength!

t_ch: 一切回合制游戏的本质都是数值游戏——好好看着吧，我的计算绝对是完美的！
t_en: The essence of turn-based games lies in the numbers, so you'd better get ready to witness the precision of my calculations!

t_ch: 哈哈，真是…沸腾起来了！
t_en: Haha, things are heating up!

t_ch: 形势竟然变得如此恶劣……
t_en: Okay, I wasn't expecting that...

t_ch: 绝地求生…也是摇滚的表现！
t_en: Time to channel some rock star energy!

t_ch: 小娃儿们，就让你们看看老夫的厉害！
t_en: Behold, young whippersnappers, prepare to witness my unparalleled talents!

t_ch: 真是强而有力、强而有力啊！
t_en: Such strength! Such might!

t_ch: 你们干脆直接认输吧，别浪费彼此的时间了。
t_en: Why not call it quits and save us all some time?

t_ch: 制作组也没实装认输的功能啊……
t_en: Seems the devs forgot to include a surrender option...

t_ch: 好了好了，就到这里吧。我还赶时间，我认输。
t_en: Okay, okay, enough already. I don't have time for this. You win.

t_ch: 就算你这么说，对决也停不下来啊！
t_en: We're not done with you yet!

t_ch: 就让我看看…你们是否真的像那位女士说的那样强大！
t_en: It's time to see if you're as strong as she says you are!

t_ch: 原来是这样…我明白那位女士为何会对两位如此青睐有加了！
t_en: Now I see why she holds you in such high regard!

t_ch: 来来！瞧一瞧，看一看——共演现在正式开始咯！
t_en: Here we go! Ladies and gentlemen, prepare to be amazed!

t_ch: 气势不错嘛！但你们还能把气氛炒得更火热吗？
t_en: Nice, you guys are bringing the heat! Can you go one better...?

t_ch: 认输吧，你们赢不了我的。
t_en: Just give up already. You've got no chance.

t_ch: 嘁…还真难缠。
t_en: Didn't see that coming...

t_ch: 我们又见面了——让我看看吧，你们这次是否还能够击败我！
t_en: Here we are again — let's see if you've still got what it takes!

t_ch: 精彩、精彩！就让我们把这场表演推上高潮吧！
t_en: Superb! Now it's time for the crescendo!

t_ch: 就让你们看看吧——我「冠军首席」的称号可不是白叫的。
t_en: Watch and learn — there's a reason they call me a champion!

t_ch: 不愧是那两位看中的人…我也要使出全力了！
t_en: You're tougher than I thought... Time to step up my game!

t_ch: 你别不说话呀虎克！我害怕……
t_en: Gah! Hook, say something — you're freaking me out!

t_ch: …虎克要拼尽全力了！
t_en: ...Hook won't hold back, just you watch!

t_ch: …好强悍的气场！
t_en: ...Wow, things are getting tense!

t_ch: 放马过来吧——用上你们的全力！
t_en: Game on — show me what you're made of!

t_ch: 我绝不会让「铁臂」卢卡这个名字在擂台上蒙羞…！
t_en: I won't let anyone ruin the reputation of Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，今天就是大赛开幕的日子啦～你准备好了吗？
t_en: Today's the day of the tournament, {NICKNAME}~ Are you ready?

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 整装待发！
t_en: Ready!

t_ch: 看你这么有精神，我就放心了。
t_en: Good! Seeing you so full of energy makes me less nervous, hehe.

t_ch: 我激动得一晚没睡。
t_en: I was too excited, I didn't sleep a wink all night.

t_ch: 理解理解，不过可不要影响到今天的比赛状态啦。
t_en: Hmm, I just hope that doesn't affect your performance today!

t_ch: 走吧，出发去<color=#dbc291ff>「星际决胜庆典会场」</color>！
t_en: Let's get going, to the <color=#dbc291ff>Interastral Tournament Festival venue</color>!

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！
t_en: Oink, oink, oink!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，三月七小姐！你们来了！
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, Miss March! You made it!

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！哼！
t_en: Oink, oink! Oink!

t_ch: 好久不见！
t_en: Long time no see!

t_ch: 请问是在这里注册参赛资格吗？
t_en: Is this where we register for the competition?

t_ch: 请把以太硬币交给我吧，我来为两位注册参赛资格。
t_en: Please hand me your Aether Coin, and I'll help you with the registration process.

t_ch: 完成，两位的信息上传到锦标赛系统中了。两位只要向那边的同事告知准备完成，就可以入场比赛了。
t_en: All done. Your information has been uploaded to the system. Just inform my colleague over there when you're ready, and you can enter the arena.

t_ch: 距离比赛还有一段时间，两位可以利用这段时间好好准备一下——祝二位旗开得胜！
t_en: You still have some time before the competition starts, so why not make the most of it to prepare yourselves? I wish you all the best!

t_ch: 哼哼哼！哼哼，哼！
t_en: Oink. oink! Oink, oink!

t_ch: 看来{TEXTJOIN#54}已经很有干劲了——我们也四处转转，好好做一下准备吧。
t_en: Looks like {TEXTJOIN#54} is really fired up! Let's take a look around while we get ready.

t_ch: 比赛即将开始，请问您要现在入场吗？
t_en: The contest is about to begin. Do you wish to enter the arena now?

t_ch: 入场。
t_en: I wish to enter.

t_ch: 没问题，从此处电梯向下即可抵达比赛场地。
t_en: Please take this elevator down to the arena.

t_ch: 稍后再说。
t_en: I need more time.

t_ch: 没问题，若您想要入场，随时告诉我即可。
t_en: No problem. Just let me know when you're ready.

t_ch: 啊…是外来者{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}！
t_en: Hey, it's you guys!

t_ch: 我听别的小朋友说，你们也要来参加锦标赛，就专门跑来看了……
t_en: I heard the other kids saying you were gonna be in the championship, so I came here specially to see you...

t_ch: 祝…祝{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}比赛顺利！你们一定要赢呀，打败公司的那帮坏蛋！
t_en: G—Good luck in the match! You gotta win — beat those IPC baddies!

t_ch: 这不是外来者么！听说你们也报名参加了这次的锦标赛，希望能在比赛中和你们顺利会师！
t_en: Oh, it's the outsiders! I've heard you entered the championship. Looking forward to meeting you in the field!

t_ch: 当然，如果真要到了那时候，我可绝不会手下留情——你们一定要为那天在铁卫禁区里的暴行付出代价！
t_en: Of course, when it comes down to it, I won't hold back — you'll pay for what you did in the Restricted Zone!

t_ch: …哈哈哈，开玩笑的。友谊第一、比赛第二，祝你们好运！
t_en: ...Haha, I'm just messing with you. Friends first, competitors second, right? Best of luck out there!

t_ch: 哟，{NICKNAME}！你们是来看比赛的吗？
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Here to watch the competition?

t_ch: 你没听说吗，希露瓦？他们也拿到了四枚资格徽章啊。
t_en: Serval, haven't you heard? They managed to secure all four Mastery Marks!

t_ch: 哦～原来是来参加比赛的啊！要是我们能在比赛中碰面，可要让你们见识见识我们的真本事！
t_en: Oh, so you're here to take part? Well if we bump into each other out there you'd better be ready. This time we're gonna show you what we're really made of!

t_ch: 哼哼…瞧好了吧，我的计算这次可不会再失误了。
t_en: Mm-hmm... That's right, we won't be making any mistakes this time round!

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。希儿刚跑去维持秩序了，我正发愁比赛前该做些什么呢……
t_en: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Seele's gone to help out with the crowd, meanwhile I'm stuck here still worrying about what I should do...

t_ch: 虽然和公司的相处有些不愉快，但我们还是不希望影响到百姓们的娱乐生活……
t_en: I know we've had our run-ins with the IPC, but I'm hoping we can set aside our differences for once, if not just for the sake of the people...

t_ch: 我们与这个宇宙隔绝了太久，这场庆典正是我们重新与星际接轨的重要机会——因此，我也必须尽到地主之谊才行。
t_en: We've been disconnected from the rest of the universe for far too long, but I really believe the festival could be our chance to reconnect with other worlds again. It's important as a host that I make all guests feel welcome.

t_ch: 我会在观众席上好好看着你们的——加油，也祝你们玩得开心。
t_en: I'll be in the crowd, cheering you on. Remember to give it your all, and most importantly — have fun!

t_ch: 哈，我还以为是谁呢——没想到第一个前来挑战的是你们啊。
t_en: Well look who it is! I didn't expect you two to be the first up!

t_ch: 请多指教！
t_en: Show us what you've got!

t_ch: 也请你多多指教了，贝洛伯格的大英雄！
t_en: Likewise. Let's see what the saviors of Belobog are capable of!

t_ch: 是我，不满意？
t_en: Yeah, it's me. Got a problem with that?

t_ch: 哈哈，怎么会！不如说，多亏是你——我就喜欢有挑战性的对手！
t_en: Haha, not at all! I relish a good challenge!

t_ch: 可别以为我会手下留情！我引以为豪的以太灵，一定会将你们全部击溃！
t_en: But don't expect me to go easy! My prized Aether Spirit is gonna crush you!

t_ch: 呼…气氛到位，我也感觉要激动起来了。
t_en: Whoa... this atmosphere is crazy!

t_ch: 看来对方也做好准备了——{NICKNAME}、{TEXTJOIN#54}，我们上吧！
t_en: Looks like he's ready for us. {NICKNAME}, {TEXTJOIN#54}! Let's roll!

t_ch: 哼哼！哼，哼哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 本场对决的胜利者是——
t_en: And the winners are...

t_ch: 贝洛伯格的英雄——{NICKNAME}与三月七——！
t_en: The Heroes of Belobog — the Trailblazers, {NICKNAME} and March 7th!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，真不愧是贝洛伯格的大救星——
t_en: Hah, you two really live up to your names.

t_ch: 真是痛快！照你们这势头，拿下冠军首席的称号也是分分钟的事吧？
t_en: At this rate you'll have championship title in no time!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，借你吉言～
t_en: Heh, thanks, I hope so~

t_ch: 哼哼！哼，哼哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 下一场比赛即将开始——
t_en: The next contest is about to begin.

t_ch: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
t_en: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and prepare to enter the arena!

t_ch: 下场比赛好像马上要开始了。我们先回趟准备区吧。
t_en: The next contest is starting soon — let's go to the prep zone.

t_ch: 我的冠军之旅就到此为止了…你们两个，加油啊！如果拿下冠军的是你们，贝洛伯格的大家一定会热血沸腾的吧！
t_en: Well, my dream of becoming champion ends here... but I've got faith in you two. If you two clinch the title, the whole of Belobog will be singing your praises!

t_ch: （比赛马上就要开始了……）
t_en: (The next contest is about to begin...)

t_ch: （好好整备一下，或者和大家聊聊天放松心情吧……）
t_en: (Do I take some time to prepare, or chat with everyone to ease my nerves a bit...?)

t_ch: 刚才那场对决可真是精彩！
t_en: Our bout just now was something else!

t_ch: 我可不会轻易气馁…等你们有空，就来找我切磋切磋吧！
t_en: I'm not easily discouraged though — let's go another round when you guys get the time!

t_ch: 不过，这些都要等到锦标赛结束之后再说。眼下你们还是好好备战，别被其它事分了心！
t_en: Anyway, for now, just stay focused. Don't let yourselves get distracted!

t_ch: 虽然来得有点迟，但我还是有幸观看了你和卢卡的整场比赛——真是太精彩了。
t_en: I got here a little late, but I watched your duel with Luka — it was amazing!

t_ch: 第一次听到诊所的孩子们谈起这个「游戏」，我还以为这又是他们平时的过家家……
t_en: When I heard the kids at the clinic talking about this "game," I thought they were just making things up again...

t_ch: 但在观看比赛后，我的想法彻底改变了——我理解了人们为之心醉的原因。
t_en: ...but after seeing it for myself, I can totally see why people are so taken in by it.

t_ch: 在「游戏」的过程中，人们可以专注于精进自我，或是与他人携手共进。这种无害的竞争对于消解敌意和纷争来说很有意义。
t_en: This game allows people to work on themselves, or form strong bonds by teaming up with others. Harmless rivalry is a great way for people to settle their differences.

t_ch: 哈哈，这不是我们的大赢家{NICKNAME}嘛！
t_en: Haha, well if it isn't the big winner, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 你和卢卡那小子的比赛，我观摩了全程——真是精彩到连我也热血沸腾起来了！
t_en: I saw your duel with Luka — I gotta admit, I was on the edge of my seat!

t_ch: 而且，我听说这游戏并非只有小孩子才能参与…等我忙完了也要好好体验一把，哈哈哈。
t_en: I heard this game isn't just for kids... I might have a crack at it myself once I get the time, haha!

t_ch: 小妹初到贵宝地，耍耍把式卖卖艺——
t_en: Outworlder girl in a strange new land, came to perform and make her stand⁓

t_ch: 仨瓜俩枣不嫌少，千金一掷显情义——
t_en: Here for a show and here for the day, but bring your wallet 'cause you get what you pay⁓

t_ch: 闲言碎语不要讲，给您来段看家戏！
t_en: Words and whispers hold no sway, better get ready for the grand display!

t_ch: 哎呀，咱可没见过这阵仗哪！这不比长乐天那小广场气派多了？
t_en: Wow, I've never seen anything like this before! It's so much more spectacular than the little plaza in Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 呀，我们又见面啦！真没想到会在这儿再见到你们～
t_en: Fancy running into you two again! What a pleasant surprise~

t_ch: 真没想到啊。
t_en: Well, this is unexpected.

t_ch: 你为了卖艺流窜到这儿了？
t_en: Here to expand your show biz?

t_ch: 嗯…倒也有这个原因！但咱主要还是为了参加锦标赛才来到这里啦。
t_en: You could say that! But the main reason I'm here is to take part in the championship!

t_ch: 能再来段五信用点的不？
t_en: Can I watch a show for five credits?

t_ch: 没问题！但要等咱先忙完手头的活计再说啦。
t_en: You bet! Once we're done here I'd be glad to!

t_ch: 既然你们也出现在这儿了…这就说明，我们现在是对手了，对吧？
t_en: I suppose we're rivals for the time being, huh.

t_ch: 嗯…应该是这样没错？
t_en: Yeah, I guess you're right.

t_ch: 这还是咱头一回和别人共演呢！来吧，小三月，做好准备……
t_en: Well, you know what they say — break a leg! Metaphorically, of course...

t_ch: …我们一起炒热全场的气氛吧！
t_en: Let's put on a show to remember!

t_ch: 哼哼！哼——哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink... oink!

t_ch: 本场对决的胜利者是——
t_en: And the winners are...

t_ch: 仙舟联盟的伙伴——来自星穹列车的开拓者——！
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance duo — the Astral Express Trailblazers⁓!

t_ch: 哈——刚才这场对决可真是惊险，咱这小心脏都提溜到嗓子眼儿来啦。
t_en: Now that was a performance! I thought my heart was going to jump out of my mouth!

t_ch: 不愧是我的好{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！你这实力，已经和我不相上下了——我说，回头要不和我一起在长乐天卖艺吧？有二位在，我保证场场演出座无虚席！
t_en: Ever thought about joining me in Exalting Sanctum? With our skills combined I'm sure we'd be great together — there wouldn't be an empty seat left!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，可那地方真有座位嘛……
t_en: Well, technically there aren't any seats... But anyways!

t_ch: 哼——哼，哼哼！
t_en: Oink... Oink! Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 下一场比赛即将正式开始——
t_en: The next contest is about to begin!

t_ch: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
t_en: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and get ready to enter the arena!

t_ch: 时间好快呀，{NICKNAME}。我们就按广播说的，先回趟准备区吧。
t_en: About time. {NICKNAME}, let's head to the prep zone.

t_ch: 快去好好休息吧，接下来可还有好几场对决等着你们呢！
t_en: Don't forget to rest! You guys have got a busy day ahead of you!

t_ch: 我会在观众席好好看着你们的——千万别输了呀！
t_en: I'll be rooting for you in the stands! Don't go losing on me now!

t_ch: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，小三月！我在这儿呢！
t_en: Hey, you two, over here!

t_ch: 自我们家几个兄弟姐妹落户仙舟以来，这还是我头一回出远门！没想到这一跑就跨越了几个星系，跑到这个冰雪星球来啦。
t_en: I don't think I've ever been this far away from the Xianzhou before! Who'd have thought I'd be hopping star systems only to wind up on this cold, icy planet?

t_ch: 感觉…这地头和我们老家的调调有几分相似：天寒地冻的，到处都是冷冰冰的铁疙瘩…哎，还是罗浮好啊～
t_en: You know, this place kinda reminds me of home... Not the Luofu, my real home. Barren, icy, jagged shards sticking out everywhere... I guess nothing really beats the Luofu, huh?

t_ch: 嗐，你瞧我，都忘了现在正还在比赛呢！不聊这些啦，祝你们马到成功——就让我看看你们的技巧究竟有多高吧！
t_en: Oops, there I am rambling on again... I almost forgot you're still in the middle of a tournament! Good luck! I can't wait to see what you're gonna pull off next!

t_ch: 唷，是你们啊。刚才那场比赛打得漂亮。
t_en: Oh, hey, it's you guys. That was some performance just now.

t_ch: 我刚才正在观众席附近巡逻——这次的庆典在贝洛伯格引起了很大的轰动…这种场合最容易发生意外，必须有人时刻盯着才行。
t_en: I've been keeping an eye on the crowds — this festival has created quite the buzz in Belobog... Accidents tend to happen in these situations, so it's crucial to have someone keeping an eye out at all times.

t_ch: 不过还好，你们赢了，皆大欢喜。你们大概不知道吧，贝洛伯格有些人可是你们的狂热粉丝…要是你们被淘汰出局了，他们不知道会闹出什么动静来。
t_en: But things are going well — you guys pulled off a win, and everyone's happy. You've got quite a few die-hard fans in Belobog, you know. If you guys had been knocked out of the competition, there's no telling what they might have done.

t_ch: 好了，闲聊就到这儿吧。我也该继续去工作了…祝你们一路连胜。
t_en: Anyway, I should get back to work... Here's hoping you keep on winning.

t_ch: 阿丽娜…你就瞧好了吧，我将来一定也会成为像开拓者{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}一样厉害的以太战线玩家！
t_en: Alina... you just wait and see, I'm gonna become a super-duper Aetherium Wars player one day just like {M#him}{F#her}!

t_ch: 我很期待那一天到来哦。
t_en: I can't wait, it's gonna be so cool!

t_ch: （两位小朋友似乎完全没有注意到我……）
t_en: (Seems like the two kids haven't even noticed me.)

t_ch: 哼——哼？哼哼？
t_en: Oink? Oink, oink?

t_ch: 大屏幕上明明显示着那位星核猎手姑娘…但场地里怎么没见到人呢？
t_en: It's the Stellaron Hunter girl... I can see her on the big screen, but where is she in the arena?

t_ch: 嘿，她不会是被咱俩吓跑了吧？
t_en: Haha, you think we scared her off?

t_ch: 她不是这样的人。
t_en: I don't think that's her style.

t_ch: 咳咳——能听到吗？喂喂喂——
t_en: Ahem... Hello? Testing, testing...

t_ch: 我说你，很识时务嘛，我欣赏你。
t_en: Sounds like you got me all figured out again.

t_ch: 我看很有可能。
t_en: It's quite possible.

t_ch: 咳咳——能听到吗？喂喂喂——
t_en: Ahem... Hello? Testing, testing...

t_ch: 口气不小嘛。别做梦了，我怎么可能被你们吓跑？
t_en: Quite the bold statement. Hate to break it to you, but I don't get "scared off."

t_ch: …她竟然骇入会场的广播系统了吗？！
t_en: She's hacked into the speakers!

t_ch: 小意思，都是老掉牙的设备了，对我来说也就是分分钟的事。
t_en: These obsolete contraptions are so last century. It's child's play for someone like me...

t_ch: 可惜，这块屏幕操作起来居然还有点难度…罢了，这样的亮相也足够了。
t_en: ...but this screen seems trickier than I expected... Never mind, this'll have to suffice.

t_ch: 你胆子也太大了吧？！
t_en: Can you believe her!?

t_ch: 哼，谁叫公司的安保系统这么薄弱？
t_en: Hey, don't blame me for the IPC's embarrassingly weak security system.

t_ch: 行了，别管他们了。你们接下来的对手是我……
t_en: Alright, enough chit-chat. It's time to reintroduce your next opponent... me!

t_ch: 给我打起精神来——可别让我感到无聊啊。
t_en: You better step up your game, cause I didn't come for a snooze-fest.

t_ch: 本场对决的胜利者是——
t_en: And the winners are...

t_ch: 空间站「黑塔」的拯救者——开拓者与三月七——！
t_en: The valiant saviors of Herta Space Station — the Trailblazers⁓!

t_ch: 真是精彩的战斗。
t_en: What a fight!

t_ch: …我得承认，你们刚才的表现确实不错。
t_en: ...I have to admit, you guys are stronger than I expected.

t_ch: 怎么，输得自闭了？
t_en: What's that? At a "loss" for words?

t_ch: 嘁，想多了。
t_en: Tsk, don't get ahead of yourself!

t_ch: …但我得承认，你们刚才的表现确实不错。
t_en: ...But I gotta give credit where it's due, nice work.

t_ch: 老实说，在游戏领域，已经很久没人能把我逼到这个份上了…你们是过去几年里头一个。
t_en: I gotta be honest, I haven't been pushed that hard in ages...

t_ch: …我承认你们的实力。
t_en: I hate to admit it, but you two have some serious skills.

t_ch: 原来倔强的星核猎手，也是会主动认输的呀……
t_en: So, even the mighty Stellaron Hunter is willing to admit defeat, huh...

t_ch: 哼？哼哼，哼！
t_en: Oink? Oink, oink! Oink!

t_ch: 下一场比赛即将正式开始——
t_en: The next contest is about to begin!

t_ch: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
t_en: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and prepare to enter the arena!

t_ch: 啧，犯不着那么惊讶吧。不遵守游戏的规则，就等同于剥夺了游戏的乐趣啊。
t_en: Tsk, no need to act surprised, alright? I could've "bent" the rules if I wanted to, but then what fun would that be?

t_ch: 行了，动起来吧，我们都该回准备区了…下一场比赛还在等着你们呢。
t_en: Time to head back to the prep zone, you've got another duel waiting for you, remember?

t_ch: 如你所见，因为某些客观原因，我现在没办法以实体现身…所以只好通过全息投影的方式参赛了。
t_en: As you can see, due to certain reasons... I couldn't be here in person. Looks like I'm attending the rest of the tournament as a hologram.

t_ch: 虽然我们的立场不同…但在这样一场宇宙级的盛会上，就先放下那些成见，共同享受游戏的快乐吧——你说呢？
t_en: We're not the best of friends, that's no secret, but for the sake of the event, how about we pause the drama? I'd rather soak in the atmosphere and enjoy myself.

t_ch: 在游戏面前，种族、血统、阵营、命途、价值观…这些通通都不算什么——这是来自一位老玩家的忠告，你可要牢牢记住啊。
t_en: When it comes to gaming, things like race, lineage, allegiance, destiny, beliefs... they're all insignificant. It's good to remember that.

t_ch: 你们来了。刚才那场对决真是激烈，让我回忆起自己参加银鬃铁卫比武的时候了。
t_en: There you are. That last showdown was intense — it reminded me of my own time competing in the Silvermane Guards' martial contests.

t_ch: 可惜，我身为戍卫官有要务在身，无法与各位同乐。不过我给佩拉情报官放了假——她平时工作压力太大，正好可以趁这个机会放松放松。
t_en: Unfortunately, my duty as Captain comes with pressing tasks — I'm afraid I can't partake in the fun... but I have given Officer Pela a well-deserved day off. She's normally swamped with work, so this is the perfect chance for her to relax.

t_ch: 能看到大家乐在其中，我也非常欣慰。但是直觉告诉我，事情恐怕没有这么简单…这些天外来客将这种娱乐带来贝洛伯格，真的是好事吗？
t_en: Seeing everyone enjoying themselves brings me great satisfaction... Still, my gut tells me something's happening below the surface... Are these visitors from beyond the sky really doing us a favor by bringing this kind of entertainment to Belobog?

t_ch: …对不起，现在说这些恐怕是有些扫兴了。眼下还是专注于享受庆典的氛围吧，祝你们无往不利。
t_en: ...Apologies, this isn't the best time to discuss such matters. Let's focus on the festive spirit for now. I wish you the best of luck.

t_ch: 啊，是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}…！
t_en: {M#Big brother}{F#Big sister}, it's you!

t_ch: 又见面了，外来者。刚才的战斗十分精彩，祝贺你们。
t_en: We meet again, outsider. Your previous contest was highly engaging. Congratulations to you both.

t_ch: 刚才，史瓦罗先生一直在分析大家的胜率……
t_en: Mr. Svarog has been calculating the odds...

t_ch: 你们的胜率曾一度跌落至<unbreak>14.93%</unbreak>，但你们成功凭借自身的策略逆转了如此不利的局势。毫无疑问，你们有着争夺冠军的潜力。
t_en: At one point, your chance of victory decreased to <unbreak>14.93%</unbreak>, yet you successfully managed to change the course of a detrimental situation through strategic adjustment. It is evident that you have the potential for championship contention.

t_ch: 哼——哼哼！
t_en: Oink — oink, oink!

t_ch: 又见面了，两位！你们的表现果真令人印象深刻！
t_en: What a joy to see you both again! Your performances have been quite remarkable!

t_ch: 我就知道又是你。
t_en: I knew you'd turn up again sooner or later.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，难道你也感受到了吗？——来自那位大人的注视。
t_en: Haha, perhaps you sense it, too? The watchful eyes of an eminent figure.

t_ch: 为什么又是你？
t_en: How come it is you again?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，若非是命运指引我们汇聚于此，那答案便只有一个了。
t_en: Hahaha, if it isn't fate's doing, then there's only one other answer.

t_ch: 但，就让我们暂时忘记那些形而上的冗长讨论吧！眼下的要务，应当是尽情地享受这场庆典……
t_en: Let's set aside those ponderings for the moment. Our priority ought to be enjoying this delightful festival...

t_ch: 朋友们，与我共舞吧！让我们一同将这场{RUBY_B#欢愉}完美{RUBY_E#}的庆典引领至最高潮！
t_en: My friends, join me in this dance! Let's bring this {RUBY_B#The Elation}exquisite{RUBY_E#} celebration to its climax!

t_ch: 本场对决的胜利者是——
t_en: And the winners are...

t_ch: 高歌猛进的新锐玩家——来自星穹列车的开拓者——！
t_en: The daring Trailblazers of the Astral Express⁓!

t_ch: 精彩，精彩！二位的「实力」与「决心」着实令人动容！
t_en: Marvelous, marvelous! The strength and resolve you two exhibited was truly astonishing!

t_ch: 你的实力也不容小觑。
t_en: You're pretty strong yourself.

t_ch: 哈哈，承蒙谬赞！就现状而言，无疑是你的实力在我之上！
t_en: Haha, I am honored by your kind words! But there is no denying that your abilities far outshine mine!

t_ch: 到这里就结束了吗？
t_en: So... is it all over now?

t_ch: 结束？不不不，这场庆典最精彩的部分才要刚刚开始呢！
t_en: Over? No, no! The best part has yet to begin!

t_ch: 接下来，你们将要面对上届庆典的终极赢家，令万千玩家望尘莫及的高傲存在——
t_en: Next you'll be facing off against the ultimate opponent, the victor of the last tournament — a dominant force that commands both respect and admiration...

t_ch: ——前「冠军首席」托帕小姐！只有在与她的对决中获得胜利，你们才能获得问鼎冠军的资格。
t_en: The previous champion — Miss Topaz! Only by emerging victorious against her can you become eligible for true championship!

t_ch: 也就是说，接下来就是决赛了吗？
t_en: Wait a sec, does that mean we've reached the grand final?

t_ch: 哼，哼哼？哼！
t_en: Oink? Oink!

t_ch: 本届庆典的总决赛即将开始——
t_en: The moment we've all been waiting for is here... the grand final is about to commence⁓!

t_ch: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
t_en: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and prepare to enter the arena!

t_ch: 是，又不是。还记得我曾向二位不断提起过的那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>吗？她正期待着与你们展开巅峰对决呢。
t_en: Yes... and no. Do you remember the <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> I've been talking about? She's keenly anticipating a duel with the both of you.

t_ch: ——但，如果你们不能赢过托帕小姐，这一切都将成为空谈。
t_en: However, to lock horns with her, you'll have to best Miss Topaz first.

t_ch: 去吧，回到休息区好好做准备——你们可千万不能辜负那位女士的期待啊！
t_en: Off you go now, head to the prep zone and ready yourselves — I'd hate to see you disappoint her!

t_ch: 好好准备吧，二位。虽然那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>还没有现身，但她一定正在某处关注着你们的动向。
t_en: Ready yourselves, you two. While this <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> hasn't made her appearance yet, she's unquestionably keeping an eye on you both.

t_ch: 以二位的「实力」和「决心」，见到她一定不是什么难事…至少我是这样认为的。
t_en: Given your strength and resolve, I firmly believe you won't have any major obstacles in your way...

t_ch: 然而，世事万物总是变幻莫测——要想切实地完成「命运」，你们就必须付出努力，持续精进才行！
t_en: Nevertheless, life is full of uncertainties. To fulfill your destiny, one must continuously seek to improve themselves!

t_ch: 好了，闲话就先聊到这里…还请二位专心准备接下来的总决赛，祝你们成功加冕！
t_en: Alright, let's leave it at that for now... I want you both to be well-prepared for the final.

t_ch: 刚才那场比赛可真是激烈呀。在你们打出致胜一击的时刻，瓦尔特先生都激动地从坐席上站起来了。
t_en: That duel just now was pretty intense. When you dealt the winning blow, not even Mr. Yang could control his excitement. You should've seen him leap out of his chair.

t_ch: 虽然我始终对公司的产品保持谨慎态度，但置身于这样欢乐的氛围中，我倒是感觉自己的神经也被调动起来了…这种体验真是让人难忘。
t_en: I'm always wary of the IPC's products, but there's no denying they know how to put on a show. The atmosphere here is magical, I have to remind myself it's just a game.

t_ch: 这样的机会十分难得，希望你们能好好享受。毕竟「开拓」绝非纯粹的苦旅，享受旅途中的欢乐也是重要的一部分呀。
t_en: Opportunities like this don't come around every day, so I hope you enjoy it. After all, trailblazing isn't just about the challenges — relishing the fun of the journey is just as important.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}和三月，你们回来了。刚才的比赛我观摩了全程，真是精彩。
t_en: Welcome back, {NICKNAME} and March. I watched the entire duel, and I have to say what you did out there was spectacular.

t_ch: 这种游戏总会让我想起家乡的故事。在我还年轻的时候，我也曾在电视机里看过类似题材的作品。
t_en: Games like these always stir up childhood memories. I remember watching similar TV shows back when I was just a kid.

t_ch: …抱歉，聊到这些难免伤感了些。我听说接下来就是总决赛了，祝你们旗开得胜。
t_en: ...Sorry, getting a bit nostalgic here. I hear the grand final is up next, I hope you knock it out of the park.

t_ch: 本次庆典的总决赛即将开始，请问您要现在入场吗？
t_en: The grand final is about to begin. Do you wish to enter the arena now?

t_ch: 入场。
t_en: I wish to enter.

t_ch: 没问题，从此处电梯向下即可抵达比赛场地。
t_en: Please take this elevator down to the arena.

t_ch: 祝二位比赛顺利！
t_en: Good luck out there!

t_ch: 稍后再说。
t_en: I need more time.

t_ch: 没问题，若您想要入场，随时告诉我即可。
t_en: No problem. Just let me know when you're ready.

t_ch: 哼，哼哼！哼！
t_en: Oink, oink, oink! Oink!

t_ch: 你们还是带着那小家伙走到了这里…果然不出我所料！
t_en: Just as expected, you and the little trotter made it to the final!

t_ch: 不知道…你们是否享受这段旅程呢？
t_en: So... you guys been having fun?

t_ch: 我们开心得很！
t_en: We've been having a blast!

t_ch: 开心…这大概就是这场庆典的意义了。
t_en: Haha, that's the whole point of a festival, right?

t_ch: 似乎没有什么特别的感觉。
t_en: I'm not sure if I'd call it "fun."

t_ch: 没什么特别的感觉…那可真是太可惜了。
t_en: Oh, really? I'm sorry to hear that.

t_ch: 有点疲惫…
t_en: I'm exhausted...

t_ch: 是吗？我看你的表情怎么有点意犹未尽？
t_en: Is that so? You don't look too tired to me.

t_ch: 无论如何，既然两位来到这了这里…就意味着我们之间是免不了一战了——当然，是以「以太战线」对决的形式。
t_en: Anyway, since you're both here it only means one thing... war! An Aetherium War, that is...

t_ch: 希望二位已经准备好了…这场对战我可是期待已久，你们可千万别掉链子哦？
t_en: I hope you're all set... I've been relishing this duel for quite some time — don't disappoint me, now.

t_ch: <size=36>托帕！托帕！托帕！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Topaz! Topaz! Topaz!</size>

t_ch: 可恶，她的气场也太强了…输人不输阵，我们也说点什么吧，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Ugh! She's got the crowd behind her. We can't just keep quiet, say something {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 让你看看我们的「决心」吧！
t_en: Buckle up, you're about to see what we're really made of!

t_ch: <size=36>开拓者！开拓者！开拓者！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Trailblazers! Trailblazers! Trailblazers!</size>

t_ch: 嘿，这下大家就都站在我们这边啦！
t_en: Nice, sounds like we've got a few fans out there too!

t_ch: 不要小瞧我们的「实力」啊！
t_en: Don't underestimate our strength!

t_ch: <size=36>开拓者！开拓者！开拓者！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Trailblazers! Trailblazers! Trailblazers!</size>

t_ch: 嘿，这下大家就都站在我们这边啦！
t_en: Nice, sounds like we've got a few fans out there too!

t_ch: 我想回家——！
t_en: I wanna go home!

t_ch: <size=36>开拓者！开拓者！开拓者！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Trailblazers! Trailblazers! Trailblazers!</size>

t_ch: …这也行啊？！
t_en: ...They like that!?

t_ch: 哼哼，气势不错……
t_en: I'm liking the energy...

t_ch: …那就让我好好评估一下你们的价值——看看你们走到这里凭的是运气还是实力！
t_en: ...time to see if it was skill or just pure luck that got you to this point!

t_ch: 本场对决的胜利者——
t_en: And the winners are...

t_ch: 本届星际决胜庆典的终极赢家——
t_en: ...taking the Interastral Tournament Festival by storm...

t_ch: 令整个银河为之瞩目的第二位冠军首席——已经诞生！
t_en: ...the second ever team to be hailed as champions...

t_ch: <size=36>让我们恭喜，{NICKNAME}与三月七！</size>
t_en: <size=36>...the unstoppable duo — The Trailblazers!</size>
